name: @ptdl/plugin-detail-panel
description: Adds a 'Side panel' open mode to NocoBase record popups (/v/). In the 'Edit popup' dialog, alongside Drawer / Dialog / Page, pick 'Side panel' and the SAME configured popup (tabs, actions, editable form/detail/sub-blocks) opens docked into the layout's built-in embed container instead of a masked drawer — the content shrinks beside it, both stay interactive, and opening another record swaps the panel without closing it (AppSheet-style master-detail). Augments the native openView action; client-only, no server.
